slides.text:
Is it true today
That when people pray
We'll see cloudless skies
Kings and queens will shake
Well, yes, it's true and I believe it
I'm living for You
slides.label: Verse 1

slides.text:
I'm gonna be a history maker in this land
I'm gonna be a speaker of truth to all mankind
I'm gonna stand, I'm gonna run
Into Your arms, into Your arms
slides.label: Chorus

slides.text:
Is it true today
That when people pray
We'll see dead men rise
And the blind set free
Well, yes, it's true and I believe it
I'm living for You
slides.label: Verse 2

slides.text:
Yes, it's true today
That when people stand
With the fire of God
And the truth in hand
We'll see miracles, we'll see angels sing
We'll see broken hearts making history
Well, yes, it's true and we believe it
We're living for You
slides.label: Verse 3
